portrait.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG NPC portrait, bust shot of Lumina — healer and herb shop keeper. petite build, golden wavy hair to shoulders, warm brown eyes, gentle smile. Wearing white and green healer robe, herb pouch at waist, flower hair accessory. Holding/carrying healing staff with glowing crystal tip, herb basket. Special details: faint green healing particles floating around her. Expression: warm and gentle, motherly aura. Set in Erebos region with ruins, fog, spectral atmosphere. 256x256 pixel art style, dark gradient background, game dialogue portrait. Art style: pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
